name: Red Velvet Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream sugar, shortening, vanilla, and red food coloring together.
2. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk flour, baking powder, salt, and cocoa.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, alternating with milk, until combined.
5. Pour batter into a greased, floured tube pan.
6. Bake at 275°F for 1-1/2 hours or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Turn cake out of the pan onto a wire rack to cool completely.
Icing:
1. Cream together cream cheese, confectioners' sugar, vanilla, and softened butter until smooth.
2. Add additional butter if desired for a thicker consistency.
